# Mehrdad Hedayati

> Full-Stack Engineer working with PHP, TypeScript, Go, Kubernetes, and AWS. Currently Software Engineering Team Lead for Automation and AI at Roadsurfer GmbH. A decade across MarTech, EdTech, and logistics.

## Profile

- [Personal site](https://mithredate.com/): primary portfolio and contact page
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mhedayati): professional profile and work history
- [GitHub](https://github.com/mithredate): open-source contributions
- [ADPList mentor profile](https://adplist.org/mentors/mehrdad-hedayati): mentorship and career guidance

## Background

- Software Engineering Team Lead, Automation and AI — Roadsurfer GmbH (10/2025–present)
- Senior Software Engineer — Roadsurfer GmbH (02/2025–09/2025)
- Senior Software Engineer — Interaction Design Foundation (IxDF) (12/2023–01/2025)
- Full-stack Developer — Parsly (04/2023–11/2023)
- Senior Software Developer — Interaction Design Foundation (IxDF) (01/2021–03/2023)
- Software Technical Lead — PodroCo (12/2019–12/2020)
- Lead Software Developer — RDSysCo (10/2016–11/2019)
- BSc in Computer Software Engineering — University of Isfahan
